name: ArbiSafe
description: DeFi strategy simulator and risk analysis agent for Arbitrum. Simulates swap outcomes, stress tests positions, scores protocol safety, and provides AI-powered strategy advice before execution.

skills.name: Simulate DeFi Strategy
skills.description: Simulates any swap or LP strategy on Arbitrum with real onchain data. Returns expected output, slippage, gas cost, stress test scenarios, and profit projections.
examples: Simulate swapping $500 USDC for ARB on Camelot
What happens if I LP $1000 USDC/WETH?

skills.name: Get Token Price
skills.description: Fetches real-time token price, volume, and liquidity from Arbitrum DEXes via DexScreener.
examples: What is the price of GMX?

skills.name: Protocol Safety Check
skills.description: Scores any protocol or contract address on Arbitrum for safety using audit status, TVL, contract verification, and age.

skills.name: Arbitrum Market Overview
skills.description: Returns top gainers, losers, and overall market sentiment on Arbitrum.

skills.name: Gas Fee Check
skills.description: Returns current Arbitrum gas price and estimated transaction costs.
